sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong pai ciangin hong pai ciangin
A ma it te a ma aa te

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A taang ciat ding uh hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong khawm ding hi hong khawm ding hi
A gam sung om ding mi
A siangtho te, a taangpha te

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A ma aa hi, a ma it hi
